name: bronze_to_silver
description: Generates and executes a data transformation that moves a table from a raw/landing (bronze) layer to a cleansed/harmonized (silver) layer in SAP Datasphere. The transformation applies basic cleansing rules such as trimming whitespace, adding audit timestamps, and filtering incomplete rows.

table_name.description: Name of the table to transform (e.g. CUSTOMER, ORDERS).

source_layer.description: Schema or layer the source table resides in.

target_layer.description: Schema or layer the transformed table will be written to.
